eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Allegan; Barry; Berrien; Branch; Calhoun; Cass; Clinton; Eaton; Hillsdale; Ingham; Ionia; Jackson; Kalamazoo; Kent; Ottawa; St. Joseph; Van Buren, MI; at 8:22 AM on MAY 1, 2019 Effective until 10:22 AM. extra_text: CANCEL THIS AMBER ALERT - CHILD LOCATED SAFE. N/A
